# KEM Engineering & Design

> Civil and structural engineering, architectural design and construction supervision based in Kasoa, Ghana.

KEM Engineering & Design is a licensed civil engineering studio delivering AutoCAD drafting, structural drawings, architectural planning, project management and on-site supervision across Ghana.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, recent projects and consultation booking.
- [About](/about): Studio background, leadership and approach.
- [Services](/services): Full list of engineering and design services with deliverables.
- [Projects](/projects): Selected residential, commercial and structural project portfolio.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on engineering, construction and design in Ghana.
- [Careers](/careers): How to apply and what we look for.
- [Contact](/contact): Phone, email and consultation form.
